reviews.comment:
Tiene aire gratis. A la noche el shop está cerrado.

(Translated by Google)
It has free air conditioning. The shop is closed at night.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBM1oyMjhRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Incómoda como pocas estaciones de servicio. El acceso y el egreso son, incluso, peligrosos.
Recibimos una cordial atención del playero, por eso las tres estrellas

(Translated by Google)
Uncomfortable like few other gas stations. Access and exit are even dangerous.
We received courteous service from the attendant, hence the three stars.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBbll5bW13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Falta aseo en kilos baños, baja mucha gente y no se ve gente limpiando.

(Translated by Google)
There is a lack of cleanliness in the bathrooms; many people go down there and you don't see anyone cleaning.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTURBcFl5dFpBEAE

reviews.comment:

Excellent service, and very fast

reviews.comment:
Fui mal atendido por el playero.. una lastima que no cumpla el papel de servicio.. pedí por agua caliente y no le habían dejado fichas , pregunte como salir a la ruta y me contesto creo que por allá..

(Translated by Google)
I received poor service from the attendant... it's a shame he doesn't fulfill his role as a service provider... I asked for hot water and they hadn't left any tokens, I asked how to get to the highway and he replied, "I think it's that way..."
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBZy1xckZnEAE

reviews.comment:
No es un gran pawador, más bien solo para cargar combustible, pero destacó la atencion, higiene.

(Translated by Google)
It's not a great gas station, more for refueling, but the service and hygiene stood out.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBOWZYNllnEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio,muy cordiales,y super limpio todo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very friendly, and everything was super clean

reviews.comment:
Espectacular y los playeros son re copados, te explican todo y trabajan re bien

Spectacular and the beach attendants are really cool, they explain everything and do a great job

reviews.comment:
VERGUENZA las YPF de san clemente!! Te niegan los baños, excusas:
Shop cerrado y llave dentro, baños en desinfección, baño en reparación.....
Gentr consuman a estaciones de servicio que brinden mas que combustible!.

(Translated by Google)
The YPF stations in San Clemente are a disgrace! They deny you access to the restrooms, with excuses like: "Shop closed and key inside, restrooms being disinfected, restroom under repair..." People, shop at service stations that offer more than just fuel!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBdVp6OUh3EAE

reviews.comment:
Normal rapido y ágil. Cuando cargue no había quantum nafta tube qur cargar super

(Translated by Google)
Normal, fast, and agile. When I filled up, there was no Quantum gasoline available; I had to fill up with premium.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3860923549066547305/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnTUNBNHRMNWFREAE
